title: Nuclear startup Valar Atomics in talks to raise new funding at $6B valuation | TechCrunch
summary: Valar Atomics, a startup building small modular nuclear reactors (SMRs) — essentially miniaturized, factory-built power plants designed to be cheaper and faster to deploy than traditional reactors — is in talks to raise a new round of capital, according to three sources…
